MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR JUL-27-2020 - GAYLE GUTEKUNST, ESQ. SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER AT TRIAL CALL. AT THE LAST TRIAL CALL ON 06/29/20, WHEREIN THE COURT GRANTED THE CONTINUANCE AND PLAINTIFF WAS TO GIVE NOTICE, COUNSEL WAS UNSURE IF NOTICE WAS GIVEN TO DEFENDANT. THE COURT GRANTED PLAINTIFF'S ORAL MOTION TO CONTINUE THIS TRIAL DATE WITH A CONTINUANCE FEE OF $60 TO BE PAID IN ROOM 103. THE TRIAL DATE IS CONTINUED TO OCT-26-2020 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. PLAINTIFF TO GIVE NOTICE. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206/SKF)

REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR OCT-26-2020 - ***CASE IS DISMISSED.*** MITCHELL WONG, ESQ. SPECIALLY APPEARING ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER AT TRIAL CALL. THE COURT ORDERED MR. WONG TO PAY THE $60 MOTION CONTINUANCE FEE THAT WAS PREVIOUSLY STILL OWED FROM THE JUL-27-2020 TRIAL CALL CALENDAR AND REQUEST REIMBURSEMENT FROM PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL. THE COURT GRANTED MR. WONG'S REQUEST TO DISMISS THE CASE WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206/SKF)
